era: Math Rock. E=6 -- intricate, technical, danceable, layered. Return from degree 113. Suicide Squeeze. v1.49.356.

location.formative: Seattle math rock/post-hardcore scene. Botch connection.
location.career: Minus the Bear. 2001-2018. Suicide Squeeze. Math Rock.

theory_nodes.concept: Accessible math rock -- complex time signatures submerged beneath pop melodies and electronic textures. You can dance in 7/8 without knowing it.
theory_nodes.description: Accessible math rock. Complexity hidden inside groove.

genealogy.relationship: Minus the Bear at 215. Returns from 113.

theory_nodes.concept: Botch-to-Bear pipeline -- Dave Knudson: mathcore violence to math rock beauty. Same technique, opposite aesthetic. Chaos refined into shimmer.
examples: Minus the Bear: shimmering, precise, beautiful (2001-2018).
theory_nodes.description: Botch-to-Bear pipeline. Chaos refined into precision.

genealogy.relationship: Knudson at 215. Technique persists, aesthetic evolves.

cross_references.relationship: Third consecutive E=6. Sludge (214) to math rock (215).
RETURN! 102-degree gap. Math rock precision re-enters.
Math rock (215) to post-hardcore (216). Precision to chaos.
